channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senator Warren urges Platner to withdraw from race
item.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren calls on Maine Democratic Senate nominee Graham Platner to exit the race following an accusation by a woman.

item.title: Georgia official criticizes Senator Ossoff over foster care role
item.description: Georgia's top child welfare official accuses Sen. Jon Ossoff of exaggerating his involvement in foster care reforms while neglecting vulnerable children.

item.title: Allocco tells Newsmax GOP turnout hinges on results
item.description: Polling expert Patrick Allocco warns that Republican voter enthusiasm may wane before the November midterms if they do not deliver on promises.

item.title: Congresswoman Luna seeks probe into Patriot Front
item.description: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna calls for an investigation into the Patriot Front after the group marched in Washington over the Fourth of July weekend.
